title: VibrantAura
body:
# About
This resource pack is a completely retexture for Ellpeck's mod [Nature's Aura](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-aura). The new textures follow the 1.14+ Jappa style, giving you an entirely new look.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10acfd145a129c27350168cdabb7155517214667.png)
